input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8857 [Automation] java run fails for org.neo4j.driver:neo4j-java-driver:5.28.8; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: End-to-end query/session coverage of the Neo4j Java Driver would require a running Neo4j server, but the existing reachability tests already exercise meaningful offline APIs such as Values, ListValue, object mapping, and constructor/property mapping.

The failing test for 5.28.8 compares the exception message against the canonical nested-class name while the driver now reports the binary nested-class name with '$'; this should be handled as a test compatibility fix, not setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is needed: the resolved 5.28.8 artifact brings its required runtime dependencies transitively, includes its own native-image properties, and the observed Java failure is an offline test assertion mismatch in object-mapping behavior rather than a missing service, dependency, environment variable, or system property.
